concept: I want an arcade game where I control an amorphous blob creature that absorbs objects to temporarily gain their properties. Consuming metal makes me heavy and durable but slow, glass makes me fragile but reflective of energy attacks, light sources allow me to glow in dark areas, and springs let me bounce to high places. The blob can only maintain a limited mass, forcing strategic decisions about which properties to keep and which to discard. The story follows my blob's journey of self-discovery as it gradually develops sentience through the absorption of increasingly complex objects.
